phrases.intent_en: Ask where to find the penguin exhibit
phrases.text_local: Disculpe, ¿dónde está la exhibición de pingüinos?
phrases.pronunciation: Dees-KOOL-peh, ¿DOHN-deh eh-STAH lah ehks-pee-bee-SYOHN deh peen-GWEE-nohs?

likely_response.local: Pase por Planet Penguin, al final a la
likely_response.pronunciation: PAH-seh POHR plah-NEHT pehn-G-een AHL fee-NAHL AH LAH
likely_response.translation_en: At the back, Penguin Planet zone.

responses.english: At the back, Penguin Planet zone.
responses.phonetic: PAH-seh POHR plah-NEHT pehn-G-een AHL fee-NAHL AH LAH
responses.french: Pase por Planet Penguin, al final a la

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the on-site restaurant is
phrases.text_local: Disculpe, ¿dónde está el restaurante del parque?
phrases.pronunciation: dees-KOOL-peh, DOHN-deh eh-STAH el rrehs-tow-RAHN-teh dehl pahr-KEH?

likely_response.local: Junto al acuario, a la izquierda.
likely_response.pronunciation: HOON-toh AHL ah-koo-ah-REE-oh AH LAH eeth-k-ee-EHR-dah

responses.phonetic: HOON-toh AHL ah-koo-ah-REE-oh AH LAH eeth-k-ee-EHR-dah
responses.french: Junto al acuario, a la izquierda.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to buy tickets at entrance
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, DOHN-deh KOHM-proh lahs ehn-TRAH-dahs?

likely_response.local: En taquilla principal, frente a usted.
likely_response.pronunciation: EHN tah-k-EEL-lah preen-thee-PAHL FREHN-teh AH oo-STEHD
likely_response.translation_en: At main ticket office, in front of you.

responses.english: At main ticket office, in front of you.
responses.phonetic: EHN tah-k-EEL-lah preen-thee-PAHL FREHN-teh AH oo-STEHD
responses.french: En taquilla principal, frente a usted.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the orca show is
phrases.text_local: ¿Podría indicarme dónde se realiza el espectáculo de orcas?
phrases.pronunciation: poh-DREE-ah een-dee-KAHR-meh DOHN-deh seh reh-ah-lee-SAH el eh-spek-TAH-koo-loh deh OHR-kahs

likely_response.local: Siga las señales hacia Orca Ocean, al fondo.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-gah LAHS seh-NYAH-lehs ah-THEE-ah OHR-kah oh-THEH-ahn AHL FOHN-doh
likely_response.translation_en: Follow signs towards Orca Ocean, at the back.

responses.english: Follow signs towards Orca Ocean, at the back.
responses.phonetic: SEE-gah LAHS seh-NYAH-lehs ah-THEE-ah OHR-kah oh-THEH-ahn AHL FOHN-doh
responses.french: Siga las señales hacia Orca Ocean, al fondo.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if lockers are available now
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿hay taquillas disponibles para usar ahora?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-as, ay tah-KEE-yahs dee-spoh-NEE-bles PAH-rah oo-SAR ah-OH-rah?

likely_response.local: Sí, disponibles en la entrada principal.
likely_response.pronunciation: SÍ dee-spoh-NEEB-lehs EHN LAH ehnt-RAH-dah preen-thee-PAHL
likely_response.translation_en: Yes, available at the main entrance.

responses.english: Yes, available at the main entrance.
responses.phonetic: SÍ dee-spoh-NEEB-lehs EHN LAH ehnt-RAH-dah preen-thee-PAHL
responses.french: Sí, disponibles en la entrada principal.
